problem: Allowed repository mutations were not appearing as visible public wiki page changes.
repair: Pages deploy workflow now builds and deploys the Docusaurus site without requiring full governance validation to pass first. Full governance validation remains in the separate validate workflow.
done_condition: The public GitHub Pages URL shows the proof marker after the deploy workflow completes.
